title: Freshfields promotes Piusha Bose to Partnership
description: Freshfields has promoted Piusha Bose to the position of a Corporate Partner in the firm's Global M&A and Capital practice based in London. Bose has been associated with Freshfields for over 16 years, across two stints. In addition to being a Partner, she serves as the Co-Head of the firm's global India Group with Arun Balasubramanian.Bose's expertise encompasses a wide array of corporate transactions, including both public and private mergers and acquisitions, restructurings, carve-outs, sha
